駁吾刀

摩連奴的曼聯爆冷輸給了升班馬哈特斯菲爾德，許多人也對球隊的狀況產生了擔憂。賽後，摩帥就對今場比賽進行了評價，並指出了球隊失利的重要原因。

　　摩帥首先對比了今場比賽的曼聯和哈特斯菲爾德：「更有奪得勝利慾望的球隊獲勝了。當最好的球隊獲勝時，也就沒什麼可說的了。我不知道為什麼他們（哈特斯菲爾德）更想獲勝。我不會在媒體上批評我的球員們，我會去分析比賽，如果需要的話，我會批評他們。」

　　「我非常驚訝於我們球隊的表現，我沒想到會是這樣的。開場時具有情感、攻擊性、強度和慾望的球隊，那支用生命去比賽的球隊才是該獲勝的球隊。也許下半場的時候我們才有一點想要獲勝的慾望，可能我們能拿下一場和波，但是實話實說，我認為我們應該受到失敗的懲罰。」

　　隨後，摩帥還評價了球員們的表現：「上半場的時候，我就在等那個失誤的發生。失誤的是馬達和連迪路夫，也可以是其他人，因為場上球員的態度簡直糟糕。所以，他們（哈特斯菲爾德）從態度上就擊敗了我們。我喜歡在對手強於我們的時候輸波，而當我們因為態度問題而輸波的時候，這就很糟糕。」

　　「我剛才聽到靴里拉在接受採訪，他說球隊的態度和慾望非常差。我的天啊，當一球員說這種話，當一球員有了這種感覺，我認為他們應該全體去參加新聞記者會，然後解釋一下為什麼會這樣，因為我解釋不了。如果今天發生了這樣的事，那為什麼明天就不會發生呢？」

　　在談到是否是第一次從球隊身上感受到這種態度時，摩帥給出了肯定的答案：「我認為是的，我甚至都記不起來我們曾在友誼賽中有過這種態度奇差的表現。然後在下半場，他們嘗試著去面對困難的局面，不僅僅是對手加大力度的防守，下半場的風也非常大，我們本可以攻入第二個入球，收穫一場和波，但那將是一場不應該得到的和波。哈特斯菲爾德配得上勝利。」

　　「我不想去預測失敗後的反應，因為此時此刻，我不知道該說什麼。我們是來這踢一場英超比賽的，是來贏3分的，你知道，我感覺非常失望，如果我是一個曼聯球迷，一個長時間支持曼聯的人，我真的會非常失望。因為我認為你可以在對手更有質量的時候輸波，但你不能因為對手態度比你好而輸波。所以，真的很失望」

呢一刻我獌無冠軍相。好過上季D啦 哥狗同摩佬足球理念係兩極 一個注意防守。一個對守高波無興趣

摩連奴的曼聯爆冷輸給了升班馬哈特斯菲爾德，許多人也對球隊的狀況產生了擔憂。賽後，摩帥就對今場比賽進行了評價，並指出了球隊失利的重要原因。

　　摩帥首先對比了今場比賽的曼聯和哈特斯菲爾德：「更有奪得勝利慾望的球隊獲勝了。當最好的球隊獲勝時，也就沒什麼可說的了。我不知道為什麼他們（哈特斯菲爾德）更想獲勝。我不會在媒體上批評我的球員們，我會去分析比賽，如果需要的話，我會批評他們。」

　　「我非常驚訝於我們球隊的表現，我沒想到會是這樣的。開場時具有情感、攻擊性、強度和慾望的球隊，那支用生命去比賽的球隊才是該獲勝的球隊。也許下半場的時候我們才有一點想要獲勝的慾望，可能我們能拿下一場和波，但是實話實說，我認為我們應該受到失敗的懲罰。」

　　隨後，摩帥還評價了球員們的表現：「上半場的時候，我就在等那個失誤的發生。失誤的是馬達和連迪路夫，也可以是其他人，因為場上球員的態度簡直糟糕。所以，他們（哈特斯菲爾德）從態度上就擊敗了我們。我喜歡在對手強於我們的時候輸波，而當我們因為態度問題而輸波的時候，這就很糟糕。」

　　「我剛才聽到靴里拉在接受採訪，他說球隊的態度和慾望非常差。我的天啊，當一球員說這種話，當一球員有了這種感覺，我認為他們應該全體去參加新聞記者會，然後解釋一下為什麼會這樣，因為我解釋不了。如果今天發生了這樣的事，那為什麼明天就不會發生呢？」

　　在談到是否是第一次從球隊身上感受到這種態度時，摩帥給出了肯定的答案：「我認為是的，我甚至都記不起來我們曾在友誼賽中有過這種態度奇差的表現。然後在下半場，他們嘗試著去面對困難的局面，不僅僅是對手加大力度的防守，下半場的風也非常大，我們本可以攻入第二個入球，收穫一場和波，但那將是一場不應該得到的和波。哈特斯菲爾德配得上勝利。」

　　「我不想去預測失敗後的反應，因為此時此刻，我不知道該說什麼。我們是來這踢一場英超比賽的，是來贏3分的，你知道，我感覺非常失望，如果我是一個曼聯球迷，一個長時間支持曼聯的人，我真的會非常失望。因為我認為你可以在對手更有質量的時候輸波，但你不能因為對手態度比你好而輸波。所以，真的很失望」

災難過最差時期既伊雲斯

By Sky Sports News | Last Updated: 21/10/17 10:56pm

Mesut Ozil has told fans to "ignore the noise" amid reports linking him with a move to Manchester United.

Several newspapers reported the Germany international has told his Arsenal team-mates he will be making a January transfer move to Old Trafford, with his contract at the Emirates set to expire in the summer.

Arsene Wenger insisted Ozil will remain "100 per cent committed" to the Gunners as long as he is at the club, telling Sky Sports the midfielder has "a social contract with the rest of the players".

Ozil appears to have responded to the speculation around his future on social media, indicating his mind is focused only on Arsenal's game against Everton on Sunday, live on Sky Sports Premier League.

The 29-year-old tweeted: "Ignore the noise and stay focused."

Wenger was himself subject to constant speculation last season about his future after he delayed signing a new contract to stay at the club.

Asked if his contract situation had an effect on his side's performances, Wenger said: "It did, because it created a negative environment for the team.

A full interview with Arsene Wenger can be seen ahead of Everton vs Arsenal on Super Sunday, live on Sky Sports from 12:30pm.

Lionel Messi, Isco, Andres Iniesta and Arjen Robben among stars to be out of contract next summer
By Adam Smith | Last Updated: 12/09/17 2:29pm

Lionel Messi, Isco, Andres Iniesta and Arjen Robben are among a host of stars that could be available on a free transfer next summer.

Arsenal face the possibility of losing Alexis Sanchez and Mesut Ozil when their contracts expire in July - but there could be plenty of free replacements available.

We evaluate the top players with expiring contracts in each position, according to transfermarkt.co.uk data...

CENTRE-BACK
Juventus and Italy centre-back Giorgio Chiellini is the biggest name on the out-of-contract list of centre-backs, while young prospects Jose Gimenez (Atletico Madrid) and Stefan de Vrij (Lazio) could be coveted free targets.

Per Mertesacker is set to hang up his boots and assume a coaching role at Arsenal, while familiar names of potential free agents include Steven Caulker (QPR) and Robert Huth (Leicester).

Meanwhile, Florentin Pogba could join brother Paul in the Premier League when his St Etienne contract expires.

LEFT-BACK
Manchester United duo Daley Blind and Luke Shaw top the list of most desirable free agent left-backs - but United have confirmed one-year extension options on both players.

Former United full-back Patrice Evra could make a return to the Premier League, having just 10 months remaining on his current Marseille deal, while Burnley's Stephen Ward could also be a free agent.

Reina's Napoli team-mate Faouzi Ghoulam is a highly-rated potential free transfer, while Watford's Jose Holebas could also be on the radar of several clubs.

RIGHT-BACK
Experienced Atletico Madrid defender Juanfran is out of contract in July, as are Rafinha (Bayern Munich), Glen Johnson (Stoke) and Joel Ward (Crystal Palace).

CENTRAL MIDFIELD
A host of world-class central midfielders could be available on a free transfer next summer, including the likes of Mesut Ozil (Arsenal), Andres Iniesta (Barcelona), Leon Goretzka (Schalke) and Isco, who is reportedly set to sign a new contract with Real Madrid.

In addition to those star-studded options, alternative big names with expiring deals include Ross Barkley (Everton), Fernandinho, Yaya Toure (both Man City), Jack Wilshere, Santi Cazorla (both Arsenal) and Emre Can (Liverpool).

Elsewhere, Yohan Cabaye (Crystal Palace), Max Meyer (Schalke) and Hatem Ben Arfa (PSG) could also be free agents.

Manchester United midfielders Ander Herrera, Juan Mata and Marouane Fellaini all have contracts set to expire in July - but United have one-year extension options on Herrera and Mata.

LEFT MIDFIELD/ WING
Arsenal's Alexis Sanchez only has 10 months left on his contract, having failed to complete a move to Manchester City after would-be replacement Monaco winger Thomas Lemar reportedly turned down a transfer to the Emirates.

Bayern Munich attacker Franck Ribery could also make a swansong switch away from the Bundesliga when his contract expires next summer.

RIGHT MIDFIELD/ WING
Lionel Messi would be the undisputed all-time bargain - if the Argentinian was prised from Barcelona on a free transfer next summer.

Despite being widely regarded as the world's best player, Messi only has 10 months left on his current deal at the Nou Camp.

Former Chelsea and Real Madrid winger Arjen Robben has also entered his final year at Bayern Munich, as has Aaron Lennon (Everton) and Chung-Yong Lee (Crystal Palace).

STRIKER
In terms of strikers on potential free deals, Mario Balotelli (Nice), Fernando Torres (Atletico Madrid) and Zlatan Ibrahimovic (Manchester United) are the headliners.

Other familiar names include Diafra Sakho (West Ham), Abel Hernandez (Hull City), Mame Diouf (Stoke City) and Tomer Hemed (Brighton).

其實費 sir 都係咁上下理念，除左三叉戟果兩三年
其餘大部分都星爺/艾夫華/華西走多
果時聰明仔有年開季打得好不斷走位向前（全隊都有份）
幾場後費sir 都調整返慢慢行軍，有D似雲高爾安全踢法
而聰明仔就開始橫傳後傳
費sir 打法長途要保持體力＆穩定，
加上處理球員狀態有一手，一段段有不同球員 on fire
其實都係戰術配合到球員/反之亦然
有當fit vidic rio 卡隊 朗隊 ，突破有籣尼
問題不大

之後莫財加上球員老化
而雲高爾安全打法令到球員唔走位慢慢黎
既情況加劇十倍，打左兩年好多球員一時三刻
改變唔到，hehe 同 mata 一樣有咁情況
成日三四個人位距離互傳，唔敢自己帶幾碼波
就算無人逼都係咁上下
其他球員一樣有似情況

加上摩佬不善進攻，就攪到無 form 少走位
所以摩佬靠左羊右華斬多D波俾渣古/費蘭尼

唯有等傷兵復出＋慢慢換多一兩位血啦
其實我覺得伊巴復出作用不大
佢頂渣古個位又變返上季曼聯
一係打 442 福仔打返前鋒

Manchester United keen to sign Carlos Soler in £30m deal for next season as club aim to act early in transfer market

Manchester United are pushing to wrap up a £30million deal for Spain under 21 midfielder Carlos Soler before the summer transfer window even opens.
United have started talks with Soler's club Valencia, with the Liga side unlikely to hold out for the player's £75million buy-out clause due to financial issues.
After a series of disappointing transfer windows following the departure of Sir Alex Ferguson, United believe their ability to complete the signings of Romelu Lukaku and Nemanja Matic in July has helped their impressive start to the current season and they are keen to do their business early again.

Soler, 20, first attracted United's attention when he broke in Valencia's first-team last season.
Jose Mourinho sees him as a perfect foil for Paul Pogba and Matic in a midfield three.
Michael Carrick is likely to retire at the end of the season while there are question marks over the Old Trafford futures of Marouane Fellaini and Ander Herrera.
Soler scored for Valencia against Real Madrid in a 2-2 draw at the Santiago Bernabeu earlier this season.
